name: /plugin-list --show-cost flag includes the per-plugin token cost from the cache statistics
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'plugin_id: example\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && printf '{"plugin":"example","tokens":4500}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/cost-stats.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-list.sh" --show-cost 2>out.txt && grep -q 'tokens=4500' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
